name: lib-where-leads-go
caption:
Ever wonder where your leads actually go? Here's the journey of one missed call.

It rings out, they don't leave a voicemail, they Google the next trade, that one answers, job booked — with someone else. You never even knew it happened.

Free audit — link in bio. 👇 Save this.

#plumber #electrician #tradesbusiness #missedcalls #ukandireland

slides.headline: Where your leads actually go.
slides.body: The journey of one missed call. Swipe.

slides.headline: It rings out.
slides.body: You're on a job. Hands full. The phone's in the van.

slides.headline: They don't leave a voicemail.
slides.body: Almost nobody does. They just move on.

slides.headline: They Google the next trade.
slides.body: Three results. They start calling down the list.

slides.headline: That one answers.
slides.body: Booked. Deposit taken. Your job — gone to whoever picked up.

slides.headline: How many of these happen to you a week?
slides.save: Save this — it's happening right now
